Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13222 0 0}...And with that, all requests have been marked completed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Which means you will not receive any more requests from me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}I am satisfied, having witnessed the power you displayed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13226 0 0}It appears I am still quite distracted. I apologize.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 3 -1 -1 0 0}I have still yet to discover a solution to that certain matter... Could it be that there is no solution? Or perhaps...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Well, it is much too early to draw such conclusions. I shall see your journey to its end first.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 0 0}You have my utmost gratitude for all of your efforts to appease me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13216 0 0}Hm... I feel as though I am on the verge of a revelation of sorts...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}The vastness of your abilities has shown me great potential...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13218 0 0}I'm afraid I cannot wholly put it into words as of yet, but suffice it to say that I may have glimpsed a faint ray of hope.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}Now, I shall continue to assist you as you make evermore progress on your journey.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 202 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 13211 0 0}You have my utmost gratitude for all of your efforts to appease me.[n]{f 1 1}
